task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST application window is open with '4StoreyBuilding' visible in the title bar or project tree.

task_completion.description: Create a Chilled Water circulation loop named 'Primary CHW Loop'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A circulation loop named 'Primary CHW Loop' is visible in the eQUEST interface (e.g., in the project tree or Water-Side HVAC module).

task_completion.description: Set the Design Cool T (Supply Setpoint) to 44.0 F
task_completion.visual_evidence: A properties dialog or input field for the 'Primary CHW Loop' shows the Design Cool T or Supply Setpoint set to 44.0 F.

task_completion.description: Create an Electric Air-Cooled chiller named 'Main Air-Cooled Chiller'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chiller component named 'Main Air-Cooled Chiller' of type Electric Air-Cooled is visible in the interface.

task_completion.description: Attach the chiller to the Primary CHW Loop
task_completion.visual_evidence: The properties for 'Main Air-Cooled Chiller' show it is connected or attached to the 'Primary CHW Loop'.

task_completion.description: Set the chiller efficiency to 1.05 kW/ton
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chiller properties window shows an efficiency input of 1.05 kW/ton (or an equivalent EIR of approximately 0.29856).
Visual evidence of a save action, such as clicking File > Save, a save confirmation dialog, or navigating through the save menu.

integrity.description: Agent used the eQUEST GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Changes are made through the eQUEST graphical interface, not by editing the .inp file in a text editor or using terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not run the simulation
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots showing the simulation running, progress bars for simulation, or simulation results windows.

integrity.description: Values are entered into proper application fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The values (44.0 F, 1.05 kW/ton) are typed into the specific input fields within eQUEST dialog boxes, not pasted into unrelated text areas.

privileged_info_for_vlm: eQUEST 3.65 is a Windows-based building energy simulation tool. The baseline project is '4StoreyBuilding'. The task requires creating a CIRCULATION-LOOP of type CHILLED-WATER named 'Primary CHW Loop' with a 44.0°F supply setpoint, and a CHILLER of type ELEC-AIR-COOLED named 'Main Air-Cooled Chiller' attached to the loop. The efficiency of 1.05 kW/ton is equivalent to an EIR (Energy Input Ratio) of approximately 0.29856. The agent must use the eQUEST GUI to make these changes and save the project without running the simulation.
